cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the passage and the question carefully to determine the correct answer. The passage describes Yves Gomes, a university student in Maryland. He says he wants to continue his college education and go to medical school. He is one of thousands of young illegal immigrants who grew up in the US. He is fighting deportation to India, which he left with his parents at 14 months old. His parents were deported more than a year ago. He doesn't want to return to India because he's studying in the US. The DREAMAct is mentioned as pending legislation to help undocumented immigrants who came to the US before age 16 become legal
